qa_pairs.question: Which Austrian Grand Prix races took place on or before 1981-08-16?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT races.raceid FROM races
WHERE races.date <= '1981-08-16' AND races.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which races entities with date at most '1981-08-16' and name equal to 'Austrian Grand Prix'?
